algorithmic_contract.external_depth_bound: God's Number: every valid 3x3 state has an optimal solution of length at most 20
algorithmic_contract.runtime_claim: runtime target is machine-checked for this certification corpus, including superflip; it is not an exhaustive timing proof over all states
algorithmic_contract.solver_contract: nissy-core documents H48 as an HTM-optimal solver with no prerequisites; 'optimal' aliases to h48h7
algorithmic_contract.state_scope: every physically valid 3x3 CubeState accepted by the local verifier
algorithmic_contract.wrapper_contract: the in-repo wrapper calls nissy_solve with optimal=0 and max_depth=20, then independently verifies the returned sequence

metadata.notes: In-repository native H48 table generated through the vendored nissy-core H48 API. h48h0 is the smallest H48 table and is suitable for reproducible thesis runs; nissy-core aliases 'optimal' to h48h7, which is the first oracle-grade profile used here. Larger h-values require substantially more memory.
